title: pleiogyne anthemoides
intro: Pleiogyne anthemoides, also known as the Kawakawa or New Zealand Pepper Tree, is a plant native to New Zealand and Eastern Australia, belonging to the laurel family. It has been traditionally used in medicine and cooking due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pleiogyne anthemoides include treating digestive issues, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Pleiogyne anthemoides can be found in teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
